title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same feature parity as Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); supports multi-model chats, PDF uploads, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; async, streaming, and embedding APIs with fluent builder style.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for chatting with Ollama models in Rails or plain Ruby scripts.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI that wraps Ollama with syntax highlighting, chat history, and shell shortcuts.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement via VS Code extension and inline completions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community connector that invokes Ollama models from Camunda 8 BPMN service tasks for AI-augmented workflows.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n node to call Ollama chat and embedding endpoints in no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Curated Docker Compose stacks pairing Ollama with Open-WebUI, Nextcloud, Nginx, GPU support, and backup jobs.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + LangChain to chat with local PDFs.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing Ollama chat & embed APIs with admin UI and REST endpoints.

title: ollama-laravel
summary: Laravel package that wraps Ollama with facades, queues, and artisan commands for PHP developers.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside notes, summarize vault content, and generate flashcards.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform provider to provision Ollama models and set GPU-enabled EC2/Compute Engine instances.
